papers.title_en: Diffusion Flow Matching: Dimension-Improved KL Bounds and Wasserstein Guarantees
papers.authors: Marta Gentiloni Silveri, Giovanni Conforti, Alain Durmus
papers.evidence: 扩散流匹配的最优传输与Wasserstein保证
papers.tldr: 扩散流匹配（DFM）是一种前沿生成模型，但其离散化误差的收敛理论尚不完备。本文针对基于布朗运动的DFM，在KL散度和2-Wasserstein距离下，提出了改进的维度依赖收敛界。在有限矩和分数可积条件下，得到KL界最优缩放；额外一阶分数可积与弱对数凹性下，Wasserstein界与KL一致。该工作显著提升了DFM的理论保证，填补了高维泛化分析的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion Flow Matching (DFM) has recently emerged as a versatile framework for generative modeling, yet its theoretical convergence properties remain only partially understood. In this work, we provide refined and novel convergence guarantees for Brownian motion based DFMs, focusing on the discretization error. Our analysis is conducted under the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence and the 2-Wasserstein distance. Under finite-moment conditions and a mild score integrability assumption, we derive KL convergence bounds with improved dimensional dependence compared to prior work, achieving, up to our knowledge, state-of-the-art scaling under minimal conditions. We further extend the analysis to the 2-Wasserstein distance: under an additional first-order score integrability assumption and a weak log-concavity condition, we obtain convergence guarantees with dimensional dependence consistent with the KL case.
